event: The Snow Queen flies over a snowy town at night
description: An illustration depicting a spectral white figure flying over snow-covered rooftops of a medieval town at night. A large Gothic cathedral with an illuminated rose window dominates the background. The rooftops are blanketed in thick snow, with warm light glowing from windows below. Snowflakes drift through the dark sky. The ethereal flying figure trails white drapery or icy veils. The overall atmosphere is magical and wintry, rendered in soft muted colors of blue, white, and warm amber.

_meta.title: The Snow Queen Flies Through the Winter's Night
